gempyor.parameters¶

This module contains abstractions for interacting with the parameters section of given config files. Namely it contains the Parameters class.

Classes

Parameters(parameter_config, ti, tf, subpop_names, path_prefix)

Encapsulates logic for loading, parsing, and summarizing parameter configurations.

Public Methods of Parameters:

.parameters_quick_draw(n_days: int, nsubpops: int)

Formats all parameters as a NumPy array, including sampling. Returns an array of size (npar • n_days • nsubpops).

.parameters_load(param_df: pd.DataFrame, ndays: int, nsubpops: int)

Formats all parameters as a NumPy array, including sampling and overrides. Returns an array of size (npar • n_days • nsubpops).

.getParameterDF(p_draw: ndarray)

Serializes a parameter draw as a pd.DataFrame. This method only considers distribution parameters.

.parameters_reduce(p_draw: ndarray, npi: object)

Reduces parameters according to the NPI provided. Returns an array the same shape as p_draw with prescribed reductions performed.

gempyor
